title: AI agents can manage your passwords. Should we let them? Plus: The biggest Patch Tuesday ever.
summary: A podcast episode discussing whether AI agents should manage passwords and detect compromised credentials, examining cybersecurity hygiene practices. It covers Microsoft's largest Patch Tuesday with 200+ CVEs and explores C-suite executives' willingness to accept cyber risk for innovation gains.
writeup: This IBM Technology podcast episode weighs whether AI agents should manage passwords and detect compromised credentials, framing the question within broader cybersecurity hygiene practices. It also covers Microsoft's largest Patch Tuesday to date, which addressed more than 200 CVEs, and examines the willingness of C-suite executives to accept cyber risk in exchange for innovation gains. The discussion connects agentic access control to concrete tradeoffs around vulnerability detection and organizational risk tolerance.
